description: Unique identifier for each transaction. Cleaned for encoding and whitespace.
Product purchased (Coffee, Cake, Smoothie, etc.). Contains occasional UNKNOWN or missing values.
Number of units purchased. Cleaned to numeric; invalid values converted to NaN.
Price of a single unit. Cleaned to numeric.
Total amount spent for the transaction. Cleaned to numeric; may be NaN if original value was invalid.
Payment type (Cash, Credit Card, Digital Wallet, UNKNOWN). Cleaned for encoding and whitespace.
Store location (In-store, Takeaway, UNKNOWN). Missing values appear as NaN.
Date of transaction, parsed into ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD). Handles mixed formats.
